codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature contract: it introduces an async_trait-based, object-safe `InferenceBackend` trait with required methods, adds serde-enabled `BackendInfo`, extends `ServerState::Running` with backward-compatible `backend_type` and `container_id` defaults, updates process->state mapping to populate new fields, and exports the backend module from rookery-engine. Diff and tests in the commit directly cover VAL-TRAIT-001/006/007/008/009.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `rust-backend` skill procedure requires fail-first TDD (add failing tests, then implement), but this worker transcript shows implementation edits before any failing-test cycle was demonstrated.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for workerSessionId bbc06813-a9b7-4044-ad22-808d805a0786 shows code creation/edits (`backend.rs`, `state.rs`, `process.rs`) followed by the first post-change `cargo test --workspace` run; no explicit failing test run appears after adding new tests and before implementation fixes.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, and skill/procedure context for `backend-trait-definition`. Feature passes scrutiny with no code-level blocking issues against the backend-abstraction validation contract targets for this feature.
